description: Phase 13 scan_audit_summary: audit trail consumer must emit a GREEN summary — entries_total >= 1 and last_entry.engine_version matches current manifest engine.version (continuity). Historical red/fail entries are observability only, not gating.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_audit_summary.json ] && jq -r "if (.entries_total >= 1) and (.continuity.last_engine_version_matches_current == true) then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_audit_summary.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
